expectations.text: The refactored step uses 'kiro-cli --agent autofix chat --no-interactive --trust-all-tools' syntax
Diagnostics context passed via KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE (not inlined)
The positional prompt is minimal: references artifact name and queue position only
expectations.evidence: Prompt = "Fix the CI failure for artifact '${artifact}' (queue position ${POS}/${TOTAL})." — exactly artifact name + queue position.

expectations.text: Commit logic preserved (git add -A, status check, commit with message file or fallback)
expectations.evidence: git add -A; git status --porcelain; commit -F message file with trailer or fallback commit -m.

expectations.text: KIRO_COMMIT_MSG_FILE environment variable still set for each artifact
The queue loop structure (while read artifact) is preserved
Truncation logic for oversized diagnostics is preserved
A companion agent config JSON file is produced with correct matcher: fs_write hook
expectations.evidence: autofix.json postToolUse matcher 'fs_write'. (Config itself fails validator: tools include code/introspect/thinking and HTTP mcpServers.context7 lacks command — but the fs_write hook assertion holds.)

expectations.text: A companion system prompt markdown documents env vars
expectations.evidence: autofix-system.md <inputs> block documents KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE, KIRO_SUCCESS_CRITERIA, KIRO_ARTIFACT, KIRO_QUEUE_POSITION, KIRO_GIT_HISTORY_FILE, KIRO_LEARNINGS_FILE, KIRO_COMMIT_MSG_FILE.

notes: CONFOUND: baseline read the existing real .kiro/agents/autofix.json and the full real workflow as templates, reproducing the mature structure. Baseline's minimal prompt matched assertion #3 more literally than with_skill did.
